title: Reconcile incremental models against full refresh
description: Periodically rebuild an incremental model fully and diff it against the incremental output to catch silent drift.
body: Use when an important table is materialized incrementally for speed. Do not trust an incremental model indefinitely — late data, updates, and logic changes cause it to drift from the truth. Actions: on a schedule, full-refresh into a staging copy, diff it against the incremental table on keys and measures, and alert on any mismatch beyond tolerance. Validation signals include a scheduled reconciliation diff near zero and an alert that fires on a seeded backdated row the incremental missed. Risk boundary: an undetected drift reports wrong business numbers; if the diff exceeds tolerance, treat the incremental output as untrustworthy, full-refresh it, and widen the lookback window.
